user.title: Configure Bagwatch
user.description: Set up the market data providers. Bagwatch uses Twelve Data for stocks, ETFs and FX, and can use CoinGecko for crypto with fallback to Twelve Data.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Bagwatch
reconfigure.description: Update provider settings for this portfolio.

error.invalid_transaction: The transaction data is invalid or incomplete.
error.legacy_positions_present: Delete the old Bagwatch positions first, then recreate them as transactions.

user.title: Add transaction
user.description: Add one buy or sell transaction. Bagwatch will calculate the current position, average cost and realized P/L from the full transaction history.

data_description.symbol: User-facing symbol, for example MSFT.US, PKN.PL or BTC.
data_description.name: Optional friendly name used for the asset device in Home Assistant.
data_description.asset_type: Choose the asset class for provider mapping.
data_description.transaction_type: Buy adds to the open position. Sell reduces it and books realized P/L.
data_description.currency: Currency of the executed trade, for example USD or PLN.
data_description.trade_date: Execution date used to order the transaction history.
data_description.fees_total: Optional fees for this single trade.
data_description.provider_symbol: Optional exact provider ticker. For CoinGecko crypto ids you can use prefixes like cg:bitcoin.

init.title: Bagwatch options
init.description: Update provider settings. Transactions are managed separately from the integration page.
